AI-POWERED SEO RESEARCH

See what it takes to rank before you write.

Enter a keyword and review estimated competition, search intent, top ranking URLs, page word counts, content angles and competitor gaps in one dashboard.

EVERYTHING IN ONE PLACE

A faster way to qualify keywords

Stop opening ten tabs and manually counting content. RankScope brings the core SERP checks into one structured report.

01

Competition estimate

Get a 0–100 difficulty estimate based on ranking-domain strength, intent match, specialization and content depth.

42Moderate
02

Top ranking URLs

Review the actual pages appearing prominently for the keyword, not only the domains competing in the niche.

03

Page word counts

Measure accessible ranking-page content and compare the minimum, maximum and average content depth.

04

Content gaps

See dominant angles, competitor strengths, missing subtopics and a practical content format to compete.

05

Personal history

Every completed search is saved to your account, including keyword, market, intent and competition score.

06

Daily usage control

Each standard account receives 20 analyses per Pakistan day, with secure server-side quota enforcement.

THREE SIMPLE STEPS

From keyword idea to content decision

Use the report to decide whether a keyword is worth pursuing and what type of page you need to create.

1

Enter your target keyword

Choose the country and search language that match your intended audience.

2

Run the live analysis

Gemini researches current web results while the server measures accessible ranking pages.

3

Review the opportunity

Compare competition, content depth, page types, gaps and recommended positioning.

READY TO RESEARCH?

Make your next keyword decision with evidence.

Create an account to access the analyzer and your daily search allowance.

RRankScope

AI-grounded SEO research. Rankings are estimates and can vary by location, device and time.
